title: Carboxylic Acid Anhydrides Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Carboxylic Acid Anhydrides Group
- Carboxylic Acid Anhydrides Group
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).  This screening assessment focuses on 3 of 8 substances referred to collectively as the Carboxylic Acid Anhydrides Group.
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Carboxylic Acid Anhydrides Group
1,3-Isobenzofurandione
None planned at this time
Trimellitic anhydride
5-Isobenzofurancarboxylicacid, 1,3-dihydro-1,3-dioxo-
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada  Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153, No. 10.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 151, No. 49 .
Five other substances (CAS RNs  85-42-7, 26544-38-7, 28777-98-2, 32072-96-1and 68784-12-3) were identified as  being part of the Carboxylic Acid Anhydrides Group at the outset of the third phase of the  CMP . These substances were subsequently determined to be of low concern to  both human health and the environment, through other approaches. Conclusions  for the substances are provided in the Screening  Assessment for Substances Identified as Being of Low Concern using the  Ecological Risk Classification of Organic Substances and the Threshold of  Toxicological Concern (TTC)-based Approach for Certain Substances .
